title: phleum arenarium var. sardoum
intro: Phleum arenarium var. sardoum, also known as Sardinian timothy grass, is a subspecies of the Phleum arenarium plant, belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and expectorant effects, making it a potential remedy for respiratory issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of Phleum arenarium var. sardoum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote digestive health, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Phleum arenarium var. sardoum typically involve infusions, teas, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
